articles.title: TWE puts Markaranka Vineyard in Australia on block
articles.summary: Treasury Wine Estates is undertaking a number of changes to its operations.

articles.title: Fledging co-packer Mercenary Premier buys TWE California facility
articles.summary: The drinks co-packer has acquired the Baileyana Winery site in San Luis Obispo County for an undisclosed sum.

articles.title: Australia’s Treasury Wine Estates to Consolidate California Assets
articles.summary: Treasury Wine Estates will sell some California wineries and consolidate its U.S. production as it grapples with a global consumer shift toward drinking less wine of higher quality.

articles.title: Treasury Wine Estates sells Rouge Homme brand back to original owners
articles.summary: Australia’s Redman Wines is taking back the label, which originated in the Coonawarra wine-growing region.

articles.title: Treasury Wine Estates Debuts Convida As Market Weighs Valuation Gap
articles.summary: Treasury Wine Estates (ASX:TWE) has launched Convida, a new wine brand co created with Hispanic consumers. Convida is designed to celebrate Latino culture and target an underserved segment of the U.S. wine market. The brand focuses on flavor profiles inspired by Latin traditions and was developed with direct community involvement. Treasury Wine Estates, trading at around A$4.5 per share, is rolling out Convida at a time when U.S. Hispanic consumers are an increasingly influential part of...

articles.title: Treasury Wine Estates moves to “regional operating model”
articles.summary: Shares in the Daou Vineyards owner shot up more than 16% today following the announcement.

articles.title: Treasury Wine Estates launches “Latino-inspired” brand
articles.summary: The debut line-up comprises two California-made wines, Convida Blanco and Convida Rosado.

articles.title: Treasury Wine Estates Refocuses On US With Mood Based Range And Deal
articles.summary: Treasury Wine Estates (ASX:TWE) has launched a new US wine range called Frame of Mind, built around mood based products. The company has resolved a distribution dispute with Republic National Distributing Company, a major US distributor. These developments affect TWE's US presence and clarify its route to market in North America. Treasury Wine Estates, one of the larger global wine producers, is sharpening its focus on the US market with the launch of Frame of Mind, a mood themed range that...

articles.title: Treasury Wine Estates angles new range at wine drinkers’ moods
articles.summary: “As consumer wine habits shift, we’re seeing more and more consumers – especially younger generations – prioritise mood-based selections and experience,” TWE said.

articles.title: Treasury Wine Estates losses widen as US impairment confirmed
articles.summary: The Australian wine group, which has suspended a planned dividend, warned in December an impairment on the US business was on the horizon.
